data.title: BitMart launches PAX Gold (PAXG)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch PAX Gold (PAXG) at 17:00 (Eastern Time) on March 21, and the PAXG/USDT trading pair will be launched.
PAX Gold (PAXG) is a digital asset issued by Paxos. Each PAXG token is backed by a one-ounce (t oz) 400-ounce delivery gold bar, stored in Brink's vault. Users who own PAXG will also own the underlying physical gold, which is kept by Paxos Trust Company.

data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gate.io will launch PAXG perpetual contract real-time trading (USDT settlement) at 16:00 (UTC+8) on March 21, 2025, supporting 1-50 times leverage.

data.title: Mt. Gox & Ripple Co-Founder Jed McCaleb Aims to Replace ISS with Haven-1
data.description:
The post Mt.. Gox and co-creating Ripple, is now aiming for the stars—literally. His latest venture, Vast, is building a commercial space station called Haven-1, which is expected to launch by May 2026
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/mt-gox-ripple-co-founder-jed-mccaleb-aims-to-replace-iss-with-haven-1/

data.title: OKX will launch BRUSDT perpetual contract
data.description: According to the official announcement, OKX will officially launch the BRUSDT perpetual contract on the web, App and API at 4:00 pm (UTC+8) on March 21, 2025. The opening time of the BRUSDT perpetual contract is 4:00 pm (UTC+8) on March 21. The contract is based on the BR/USDT index, the settlement currency is USDT, the contract face value is 10, the quotation unit is the USDT price of 1BR, the minimum price change is 0.0001, and the leverage multiple is 0.01~20x. The funding fee adopts the current payment method, the fee collection frequency is 4 hours, and the trading time is 7×24 hours. (This newsletter is generated by AI)
